description: Style NoteBeat the summer heat with sepia's new range of tops. If light colours, comfortable material and fashionable styles is just what you looking for then then this would be the right choice. These stylish and feminine tops could be worn with a pair of black tights or leggings to bring out the intricacies of the top.Product DetailsBlue three fourth sleeve top made of light material, the sleeves have a buttoned cuff, has a mandrin collar neck with ruffles at the yoke , full buttoned placket  and  pin tucks from the backMaterial and Care100 % cotton Rinse seperatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery & printDry on reverse side under sunIron at low temperatureSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
